CustomField.formula: IF( OR( TEXT( pro_Operational_Status__c ) = "Pending Delivery", TEXT(pro_Operational_Status__c ) = "In Production" ), "On Order", IF( TEXT(pro_Operational_Status__c ) = "AOG", "AOG", IF( TEXT(pro_Operational_Status__c ) = "AOG (R)", "AOG", IF( TEXT(leaseworks__Status__c) = "Available", "-", IF( TEXT(leaseworks__Status__c) = "Assigned", TEXT(YEAR(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Lease_End_Date__c)) & "-" & TEXT(MONTH(leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Lease_End_Date__c)), "-" ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Availability
